title: Claude Sonnet 5 vs Grok 4.5: Same Intelligence, and a Price Gap Opening in September
author: ylnhari
description: Claude Sonnet 5 and Grok 4.5 sit 0.4 points apart on the Artificial Analysis index. On price they are close today - until Sonnet's introductory rate ends on 31 August and the output gap widens to 2.5x.
